title: UmaCraft+
description: QoL, Optimization and recommended Mods for the UmaCraft Vanilla+ Server
body:
Simple Modpack containing the usual optimisation and QoL mods as well as some highly recommended mods to make life on the UmaCraft server easier.

Besides FPS improvements and QoL you can expect:

- Shader Support out of the box
- Distant Horizons like render distance
- OptiFine like Zoom
- Several useful new tooltips
- Proximity based voice chat
- Borderless Fullscreen
- No Telemetry and Chat reporting/restrictions
- Mini and World Map
